Name: Codex Usage
Description: Monitor your ChatGPT Codex subscription usage in real time. Shows the 5-hour rolling limit and the weekly limit directly on your Ulanzi Deck button, with color-coded thresholds and reset countdown. Credentials are read from ~/.codex/auth.json — no API key required.

Localization.colorHint: Optional thin stripe across the top of the button.
Localization.authHint: Reads ~/.codex/auth.json (ChatGPT login). Click the button to force a refresh.
